overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack climbing a dark, stormy mountain path at night. The character ascends rocky terrain with a distant beam of light visible ahead, revealing a vast landscape with distant illuminated structures below before traversing a cliff edge.

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the rocky mountain path toward a distant vertical beam of light

entered.detail: dark jagged mountain summit against the night sky
vertical white beam of light visible at the mountain summit
dark rocky ground with loose stones and steep incline
large dark rock formation on the left side of the path
large dark rock formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep, rocky mountain trail at night, surrounded by dark stone formations. A mysterious vertical beam of light marks the summit ahead, visible against the overcast night sky with faint stars.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge path with valley overlook

events.description: path curves left revealing a distant illuminated valley or facility far below on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the mountainside path as the terrain opens to reveal a distant view of lights below

entered.detail: distant settlement or facility with warm yellow lights visible far below in the valley
steep rocky mountainside rising on the right

segments.scene_description: The path curves along the mountainside, revealing a breathtaking view of a distant illuminated valley far below to the left. The character continues along the ridge with the mountain slope on the right and the open view to the left.

events.description: character turns left back toward the mountain peak, continuing the ascent along a rocky ridge

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the peak and continuing the climb along the narrow rocky ridge

entered.detail: dark jagged mountain summit coming back into view ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns back toward the mountain peak, leaving the valley view behind. The beam of light at the summit comes back into view directly ahead as the character continues ascending the rocky ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge path with open void

events.description: moving along a narrow cliff edge with open sky and distant horizon visible to the right

agents.ego_description: carefully traversing the narrow cliffside path with the open void visible to the right

entered.detail: steep drop-off at the edge of the path with open space below
dark open sky and distant horizon or ocean visible beyond the cliff
dark storm clouds filling the sky ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a perilous cliff edge with a steep drop to the right revealing an open horizon or ocean below. Dark storm clouds fill the sky ahead as the character continues along the narrow mountain path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a dark, stormy mountain path that shifts from a narrow rocky trail to a perilous cliffside overlooking a vast horizon. It begins with the character climbing through steep stone formations toward a mysterious vertical beam of light piercing the overcast night sky. As the path curves along the mountainside, the perspective expands to reveal a breathtaking view of an illuminated valley far below to the left. The camera then pivots back toward the summit, bringing the beam of light center-frame once more as the character traverses the rocky ridge. Finally, the scene shifts toward a narrow cliff edge with a steep drop to the right, moving forward under heavy storm clouds toward an open horizon.
